sentences.arabic: أَرَادَ يَاسِرٌ أَنْ يَأْكُلَ شَيْئًا خَفِيفًا فِي الصَّبَاحِ.
sentences.translation: Jasir je htio nešto lagano pojesti ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: Yasir wanted to eat something light in the morning.

sentences.translation: Uzeo je šolju jogurta i jednu bananu.
sentences.translationEn: He took a cup of yogurt and a banana.

sentences.translation: Jeo je brzo jer je kasnio.
sentences.translationEn: He ate quickly because he was late.

sentences.arabic: خَرَجَ إِلَى الْعَمَلِ وَهُوَ يَشْعُرُ بِنَشَاطٍ.
sentences.translation: Otišao je na posao osjećajući se aktivnim.
sentences.translationEn: He went to work feeling energetic.
